meaning: n.固定器,定色剂,定影剂,把事情暗中完结的人,毒贩子
examples: The pair develop a partnership where the six-year-old boy breaks windows and runs away, so that Chaplin's character can offer his services as a window fixer.
Every new problem creates a new job for an administrative fixer.
The house we bought was not a “good-as-new” fixer-upper.
When the scramble finally happened, hackers had fixer files available for satellite thieves within 15 minutes.
This is the sort of challenge that the political fixer in Mr Persson clearly relishes.
